.file-embed.background: rgb(33, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.metadata-container.background: rgba(0, 127, 255, 0.063) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.metadata-container.font-family: "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, "Roboto Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Courier New", monospace

.metadata-properties.font-family: "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, "Roboto Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Courier New", monospace

.nav-files-container .tree-item.background: rgba(0, 127, 255, 0.063) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(0, 17, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(0, 34, 72) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-header-breadcrumb.background: rgba(0, 127, 255, 0.063) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(207, 207, 207, 0.125) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(0, 34, 72) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(0, 34, 72) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.inline-title.font-family: "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, "Roboto Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Courier New", monospace

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgba(0, 127, 255, 0.157) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(0, 127, 255, 0.157) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(0, 34, 72) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(0, 127, 255, 0.157) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(0, 17, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(0, 17, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(139, 108, 239, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(0, 34, 72) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(0, 17, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h1[data-heading=\"This is a heading 1\"].font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

h2[data-heading=\"This is a heading 2\"].font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

h3[data-heading=\"This is a heading 3\"].font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

h4[data-heading=\"This is a heading 4\"].font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

h5[data-heading=\"This is a heading 5\"].font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

h6[data-heading=\"This is a heading 6\"].font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

input.prompt-input[type=\"text\"].background: rgb(0, 24, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(0, 24, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(0, 17, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(255, 255, 0, 0.533) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(0, 17, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(0, 17, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

svg.lucide-alert-triangle.svg-icon.font-family: "JetBrains Mono", Consolas, "Roboto Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Courier New", monospace

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(0, 17, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgb(0, 34, 72) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

th.background: rgb(0, 72, 130) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(0, 17, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
